base_read.sql: SELECT s.segment1 AS SEGMENT1, s.vendor_id AS VENDOR_ID, p.party_name AS VENDOR_NAME FROM poz_suppliers s JOIN hz_parties p ON p.party_id = s.party_id WHERE s.segment1 LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-SUP-%'

interface_read.sql: SELECT i.segment1 AS SEGMENT1, i.vendor_interface_id AS VENDOR_INTERFACE_ID, (SELECT LISTAGG(CASE WHEN r.attribute IS NOT NULL THEN r.reject_lookup_code || ' [' || r.attribute || ']' ELSE r.reject_lookup_code END, '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.rejection_id) FROM poz_supplier_int_rejections r WHERE r.parent_table = 'POZ_SUPPLIERS_INT' AND r.parent_id = i.vendor_interface_id) AS ERROR_MESSAGE FROM poz_suppliers_int i WHERE i.load_request_id = :LRID
